fields.summary: YARN Web UIs should provide a robots.txt

issuetype.description: An improvement or enhancement to an existing feature or task.
issuetype.name: Improvement

fields.description:
To prevent well-behaved crawlers from indexing public YARN UIs.

Similar to HDFS-330 / HDFS-9651.

I took a quick look at the Webapp stuff in YARN and it looks complicated so I can't provide a quick patch. If anyone can point me in the right direction I might take a look.

resolution.description: A fix for this issue is checked into the tree and tested.
resolution.name: Fixed

comments.body: I'll take a crack at this. Thanks.
Uploaded a patch that provides a robot.txt for all YARN web UIs that disallows crawling. Added a unit test and tested this manually with RM/NM web UIs.
Submitted to Jenkins. [~wangda], could you please take a look ? Thanks!
